result.root_cause: Deployment v3.1.4 to nlp-enrichment-svc at 14:23:45 introduced thread deadlocks (23 detected, z-score 15.7) causing the service to hang with 156 stuck requests. This cascaded to api-gateway (89% upstream timeout rate, 498/500 threads blocked) and 6 downstream services. Database connection pool exhaustion in payment-service (67%), order-service (58%), and product-service (54%) is secondary - these services hold DB connections while blocked waiting on upstream calls through the deadlocked chain. Incident started 27 seconds post-deployment. Pattern matches past incident 'NLP Enrichment Service Deadlock After v2.3.1 Deploy' (0.94 similarity) which was resolved via rollback with 8min MTTR and automatic downstream recovery.

fix_options.title: Immediate Rollback of nlp-enrichment-svc to v3.1.3
commands: kubectl exec -n production deployment/nlp-enrichment-svc -- jstack 1 | grep -c 'waiting to lock'
sleep 120 && kubectl get pods -n production -l app=api-gateway -o jsonpath='{.items[*].status.containerStatuses[*].ready}' | grep -c true
fix_options.rollback: If rollback causes issues, redeploy v3.1.4: kubectl rollout undo deployment/nlp-enrichment-svc -n production (this will undo the undo, returning to v3.1.4)

fix_options.title: Enable Circuit Breaker and Restart API Gateway
commands: kubectl set env deployment/api-gateway -n production CIRCUIT_BREAKER_ENABLED=true UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT_MS=2000
kubectl exec -n production deployment/nlp-enrichment-svc -- curl -X POST localhost:8080/actuator/restart
kubectl rollout restart deployment/payment-service deployment/order-service deployment/product-service -n production
fix_options.rollback: Disable circuit breaker: kubectl set env deployment/api-gateway -n production CIRCUIT_BREAKER_ENABLED=false UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT_MS=5000; kubectl rollout restart deployment/api-gateway -n production

fix_options.title: Force Restart All Affected Services and Clear Connections
commands: kubectl exec -n production deployment/payment-service -- curl -X POST localhost:8080/admin/kill-long-transactions
kubectl exec -n production deployment/order-service -- curl -X POST localhost:8080/admin/kill-long-transactions
kubectl exec -n production deployment/product-service -- curl -X POST localhost:8080/admin/kill-long-transactions
kubectl rollout restart deployment/api-gateway deployment/payment-service deployment/order-service deployment/product-service -n production
fix_options.rollback: This is a restart-based fix with no configuration changes. If issues persist, proceed with Option 1 (rollback). No specific rollback needed as no config was changed, but may cause brief service disruption during restarts.
